name: TheHauntedBrocoli (Pi 5 — Claude CLI on tty1)
description: Pi OS Lite (Bookworm, 64-bit) + two-phase first-boot install. Phase 1 sets up user/SSH/WiFi/hostname + tty1 autologin. Phase 2 installs Node 20, the @anthropic-ai/claude-code CLI, and the RTL8821AU DKMS driver for TP-Link AC600 dongles. After two reboots the HDMI console auto-logs in as `brocoli` and runs `claude` ready to type. Marker file `TheHauntedBrocoli` at /boot and /home/brocoli for identification.

preconfigured.user: brocoli (password 'brocoli', NOPASSWD sudo, SSH key + password auth both enabled)
preconfigured.ac600_driver: morrownr/8821au-20210708 built + installed via DKMS for Archer T2U Nano (RTL8811AU)

first_boot_sequence: Phase 1 (~30s): firstrun.sh sets up brocoli user + SSH + WiFi + hostname + tty1 autologin. Reboots.
Phase 2 (~5-8 min on Pi 5): apt-installs nodejs + npm + dkms + build chain; npm-installs @anthropic-ai/claude-code; clones + builds rtl8821au driver via DKMS for AC600 dongle. Reboots.
Phase 3 (~10s): tty1 auto-logs in as brocoli, .bashrc exec's `claude` — ready to type. Type /quit to exit to shell.
